questions.question: What does XDR stand for in cyber security?
questions.description: XDR expands detection and response across multiple telemetry sources.

questions.question: Which data source is commonly correlated by XDR?
questions.description: XDR often correlates endpoint, identity, email, cloud, and network telemetry.

questions.question: What is a key benefit of XDR over isolated security tools?
questions.description: Cross-domain context reduces alert noise and improves investigation quality.

questions.question: Which team most commonly uses XDR for investigation workflows?
questions.description: SOC analysts use XDR to triage, investigate, and respond to threats.
